evals.prompt: Build the constitution for a compose+kotest skill I'm creating. It covers Kotlin coroutines in tests, Kotest assertion styles (shouldBe, shouldThrow, etc.), and Compose UI testing with composeTestRule.
evals.expected_output: A ## Quick Routing section with symptom→wiki-query entries for the covered technologies. Should surface gaps if Kotest is not in the KB. Should use exact wiki-query invocations, not advisory language.

assertions.text: Output contains a '## Quick Routing' header
Routing entries use wiki-query invocations (not static file paths)
Output contains thematic subsections (H3 headers)
Output surfaces KB gap for Kotest or notes limited coverage
Routing entries use bold symptom format (**symptom** →)
No advisory routing language ('if needed', 'you may want to')
assertions.check: ! grep -qi 'if needed\|you may want\|consider consulting\|feel free to' routing-table.md

assertions.text: Output has at least 8 routing entries

evals.prompt: Update the Quick Routing section in my fastapi-pydantic SKILL.md — we've added agent integration docs to the KB since the routing was last generated. The skill covers FastAPI dependency injection, Pydantic v2 models, and PydanticAI agent patterns.
evals.expected_output: A regenerated ## Quick Routing section that replaces the stale one. Should show awareness of existing section and offer to replace. Entries should reflect current KB state including newly ingested agent integration content.

assertions.text: Output contains a '## Quick Routing' header
Routing entries use wiki-query invocations
Output mentions replacement/update of existing section
Output includes PydanticAI-specific entries (the new content area)
Output uses bold symptom format
Output has thematic subsections
At least 10 routing entries total

evals.prompt: Generate the routing table for a React + Next.js skill. It covers React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo), Next.js App Router, server components, and data fetching patterns.
evals.expected_output: A complete ## Quick Routing section. Should audit the KB for React/Next.js coverage, generate well-organized thematic subsections, 15-40 entries total, all using wiki-query invocations.

assertions.text: Output contains a '## Quick Routing' header
Routing entries use wiki-query invocations
Output has thematic subsections covering multiple domains
Coverage includes hooks-related entries
Coverage includes server component or App Router entries
Entry count is 10 or more
KB audit report present (covered/gap categorization or coverage mention)
No advisory routing language
assertions.check: ! grep -qi 'if needed\|you may want\|consider consulting\|feel free to' routing-table.md
